title: CKKS 全同态加密学习笔记
summary: CKKS (Cheon-Kim-Kim-Song) 同态加密方案的核心思想、编码解码机制与算法全流程详解。包括 KeyGen、Encode、Decode、Encrypt、Decrypt、Add、Multiply、Rescale 八个关键算法的逐步拆解。

title: Hello World — Welcome to My Blog
summary: A brief introduction to this blog and what I plan to write about: white-box cryptography, PUF security, symmetric cipher design, and research life at SJTU.
